claim: Remember that AI fluency means working with AI effectively, efficiently, ethically, and safely.
actionable: Remember that AI fluency means working with AI effectively, efficiently, ethically, and safely.
source_title: Lesson 10: A closer look at Diligence | AI Fluency: Framework & Foundations Course

claim: It's the dimension of AI fluency that ensures your use of AI systems is not only productive but also rigorous, transparent, and accountable.
actionable: It's the dimension of AI fluency that ensures your use of AI systems is not only productive but also rigorous, transparent, and accountable.
source_title: Lesson 10: A closer look at Diligence | AI Fluency: Framework & Foundations Course

claim: Unlike the other competencies that primarily focus on getting results, diligence asks us to consider broader questions that are nevertheless critical to AI collaboration, particularly in professional environments, such as what are the implications of working with this AI?
actionable: Unlike the other competencies that primarily focus on getting results, diligence asks us to consider broader questions that are nevertheless critical
source_title: Lesson 10: A closer look at Diligence | AI Fluency: Framework & Foundations Course

claim: We don't just focus on getting from point A to point B efficiently.
actionable: We don't just focus on getting from point A to point B efficiently.
source_title: Lesson 10: A closer look at Diligence | AI Fluency: Framework & Foundations Course

claim: Similarly, diligence recognizes that AI systems and our interactions with them don't exist in a vacuum.
actionable: Similarly, diligence recognizes that AI systems and our interactions with them don't exist in a vacuum.
source_title: Lesson 10: A closer look at Diligence | AI Fluency: Framework & Foundations Course

claim: For example, before sharing sensitive company information with an AI assistant, it's important to first check whether the service has appropriate data protection policies in place or if your organization permits such sharing.
actionable: For example, before sharing sensitive company information with an AI assistant, it's important to first check whether the service has appropriate data
source_title: Lesson 10: A closer look at Diligence | AI Fluency: Framework & Foundations Course

claim: It is your ability to be critical and intentional about which AI systems you choose to work with and how you work with them.
actionable: It is your ability to be critical and intentional about which AI systems you choose to work with and how you work with them.
source_title: Lesson 10: A closer look at Diligence | AI Fluency: Framework & Foundations Course

claim: Ensure that the final piece meets every journalistic standard, the same standards that would apply had they written it entirely themselves.
actionable: Ensure that the final piece meets every journalistic standard, the same standards that would apply had they written it entirely themselves.
source_title: Lesson 10: A closer look at Diligence | AI Fluency: Framework & Foundations Course

claim: It's the ability to take informed responsibility for the outputs that you use or share after they've been created with AI assistance.
actionable: It's the ability to take informed responsibility for the outputs that you use or share after they've been created with AI assistance.
source_title: Lesson 10: A closer look at Diligence | AI Fluency: Framework & Foundations Course

claim: And remember that the legal and regulatory frameworks around AI are still emerging and will continue to evolve.
actionable: And remember that the legal and regulatory frameworks around AI are still emerging and will continue to evolve.
source_title: Lesson 10: A closer look at Diligence | AI Fluency: Framework & Foundations Course
